chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1745 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr. Mazhar Aftab Jokhio, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Naeem Ashraf SHO P.S A-Section Tando Allahyar -.-.-. Today, Mr. Zahid Mallah has filed vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents, who are also present in present, and stated that the private respondents have not caused any harassment to the petitioners nor private respondents have approached police officials for such a purpose. According to learned A.A.G, till date no FIR has been lodged against petitioners and the parawise comments state that police officials have not caused any harassment to the petitioners at the behest of private respondents. In view of above observations and with the directions that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioners, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
